questionHtml:
Which feature is common to both mRNA and DNA?

A. Covalent bonds between adjacent nucleotides

B. Hydrogen bonds between guanine and cytosine

C. Ribose sugar attached to phosphate

D. Antiparallel arrangement of polynucleotide strands

meta.title: Which feature is common to both mRNA and DNA? A. Covalent bonds between adjacent nucleotides B. Hydrogen bonds between guanine and cytosine C. Ribose sugar attached to phosphate D.
breadcrumbLabels: A1.2.3. Sugar–phosphate bonding and the sugar–phosphate “backbone” of DNA and RNA
